Motion For Order Vacating Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Vacating Sanctions issued on 2/4/2002 to Leonard S. Becker, Esq., in the amount of $350.00, is scheduled today. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered grated, sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
